commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `.trust-snapshot` from a fixed dark translucent background to a `color-mix()` background based on `--panel`.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main renders `.trust-snapshot` with a fixed dark background while light mode supplies dark text tokens, matching the linked readability report.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer visual proof of the changed real UI.

target.title: fix: make trust snapshot background theme-aware
target.body:
## Summary                                                                   
  - make the trust snapshot background theme-aware instead of hard-coding a    
dark translucent background                                                    
  - preserve the existing dark-mode feel while improving light-mode readability
                                                                               
  ## Testing                                                                   
  - npm run typecheck                                                          
  - npm run lint                                                               
  - npm run format:check                                                       
  - npm run check:static                                                       
                                                                               
  Closes #32
target.author: opencolin
